summary: Iteration 25 - Oval Stamp Layout Update VERIFIED. All features confirmed working: 1) Oval is taller than wide (portrait orientation) - Backend 200x280, Frontend 140x195, 2) ★ TLS VERIFIED ★ badge at top with white rounded background, 3) TLS Logo box with TSL text and 'Tanganyika Law Society', 4) QR Code has colored border around white background, 5) Stamp ID and Date shown below QR, 6) Advocate Name in white badge, 7) SCAN TO VERIFY badge at bottom, 8) Brand color from settings applied to all colored elements.

GET /api/verify/stamp/{id} - Verify created oval stamp - PASS
GET /api/stamp-templates - Get templates (found oval template) - PASS
Oval stamp elements in backend code verified - PASS
Brand color application tested with multiple colors - PASS
QR code data decodable as image - PASS

Template 'My Oval Stamp' auto-applied on selection - PASS
Oval stamp preview dimensions: 140x195 (aspect ratio 1.39 = portrait) - PASS
★ TLS VERIFIED ★ badge visible at top - PASS
TSL logo box with Tanganyika Law Society text - PASS
QR Code with brand color border - PASS
Stamp ID and Date displayed - PASS
Advocate Name in white badge - PASS
SCAN TO VERIFY badge at bottom - PASS
Brand color (#10B981 emerald) applied to all elements - PASS

context_for_next_testing_agent: Oval stamp layout update verified. Backend uses width=200*scale, height=280*scale (portrait). Frontend uses 140x195 preview dimensions. All vertical elements stack correctly: TLS VERIFIED badge → TLS Logo → QR Code with border → Stamp ID + Date → Advocate Name → SCAN TO VERIFY. Brand color is applied to borders and text. Circle stamp was verified in iteration 24. Rectangle stamps use horizontal/vertical/compact/logo_left/logo_right layouts.
